name: S-2
events: 1 Jun 2009 Found by Swedish divers approx June 2009 between Sweden and Finland. Regards Ronnie from Sweden (1)

9 Jun 2009 This submarine was found in summer of 2009 near M?rket after ten years search operation. Finnish and Swedish newspapers published good pictures of the wreck. Here is Swedish Aftonbladet: http://www.aftonbladet.se/nyheter/article5348024.ab and Finnish Helsingin Sanomat (article is in Finnish, but video has English narration) http://www.hs.fi/kotimaa/artikkeli/1135246614790 (1)
